creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #17)

I updated on a personally configured FreeBSD-main's
port tree and started a 1.82.0 lang/rust build. It
is past where the stable/14 (my testing) and
releases (Robert's testing) fail. (I've never seen
the specific problem on FreeBSD main, despite use
of armv7 poudriere jails on aarch64.)


On stable/14 I now have a PORTS_LLVM based build of
1.82.0 of lang/rust in process. But it has to build
the LLVM 17 first. (I turned off various options for
the LLVM 17 build that are not needed in order to
cut the time involved. But it will be hours before
it starts to build lang/rust itself.)
